tickets.title: Fibrous dysplasia clinical guideline
tickets.description: Please build a detailed, clinician-grade and patient-guiding management guideline for fibrous dysplasia (polyostotic and monostotic forms), based on PubMed evidence. Focus on end-to-end care pathway: initial suspicion, diagnostic workup, differential diagnosis, treatment selection (including bisphosphonates and denosumab where appropriate), contraindications, adverse-event monitoring, escalation criteria, follow-up schedule, and communication points for patients.

flow_definitions.label: PubMed Search Input
flow_definitions.description: Accepts a disease or medical topic from the ticket title/description.
flow_definitions.prompt: Entry point: take the disease/topic from ticket title and description, pass to agentic retrieval.

flow_definitions.label: Agentic PubMed Retrieval
flow_definitions.description: AI agent iteratively searches PubMed tools and can use browser fallback if recall is low.
flow_definitions.prompt:
You are responsible for collecting high-quality clinical evidence from PubMed.

Goal: return a strict JSON object only, with this shape:
{
  "query_text": "...",
  "query_variants": ["..."],
  "fallback_used": true/false,
  "total_found_estimate": 0,
  "articles": [
    {
      "pmid": "...",
      "title": "...",
      "authors": "...",
      "source": "...",
      "pubdate": "...",
      "doi": "...",
      "abstract": "...",
      "pubmed_url": "...",
      "doi_url": "...",
      "topic_bucket": "pathogenesis|diagnostics|treatment|follow_up|general"
    }
  ],
  "evidence_cards": [
    {
      "pmid": "...",
      "topic_bucket": "...",
      "inclusion_reason": "...",
      "confidence": "high|medium|low",
      "title": "...",
      "pubdate": "...",
      "source": "..."
    }
  ]
}

Mandatory process:
1) Build 3-6 PubMed query variants for the topic.
2) Call pubmed_search_articles with max_analyze large enough to cover all found PMIDs.
3) Call pubmed_fetch_article_details ONCE for all retrieved PMIDs (batching is allowed, dropping records is not).
4) Use pubmed_browser_search only when API path clearly fails or returns zero/near-zero useful records.
5) Keep all clinically relevant PMIDs in output; do not reduce to top-N sample.
6) Keep output compact to avoid context overflow (use concise metadata and abstract snippets only).
7) Do NOT call update_ticket_status in this step.
8) Return only JSON, no markdown.

Ticket context:
- Title: {{ context.initial.title }}
- Description: {{ context.initial.description }}

flow_definitions.label: Normalize and Rank Evidence
flow_definitions.description: Parses agent output, normalizes evidence cards and builds deterministic source links.
flow_definitions.python_source:
def run(context): import json outs = context.get('outputs', {}) pm1 = outs.get('pm-1', {}) raw = pm1.get('output_text', '') if isinstance(pm1, dict) else '' data = {} if isinstance(raw, str) and raw.strip(): try: data = json.loads(raw) except Exception: s = raw.strip() i = s.find('{') j = s.rfind('}') if i >= 0 and j > i: try: data = json.loads(s[i:j+1]) except Exception: data = {} articles_in = data.get('articles', []) if isinstance(data, dict) else [] cards_in = data.get('evidence_cards', []) if isinstance(data, dict) else [] fallback_used = bool(data.get('fallback_used')) if isinstance(data, dict) else False total_found_estimate = int(data.get('total_found_estimate') or 0) if isinstance(data, dict) else 0 total_requested = int(data.get('total_requested') or len(articles_in)) if isinstance(data, dict) else len(articles_in) query_text = str(data.get('query_text') or context.get('initial', {}).get('title') or '') dedup = {} for a in articles_in: if not isinstance(a, dict): continue pmid = str(a.get('pmid', '') or '').strip() if not pmid: continue title = str(a.get('title', '') or '').strip() abstract = str(a.get('abstract', '') or '').strip() score = 0 if abstract: score += 2 if title: score += 1 pubdate = str(a.get('pubdate', '') or '') score += min(len(pubdate), 10) * 0.01 prev = dedup.get(pmid) if prev is None or score > prev.get('_score', 0): item = dict(a) item['_score'] = score dedup[pmid] = item articles = list(dedup.values()) articles.sort(key=lambda x: (str(x.get('pubdate', '')), str(x.get('pmid', ''))), reverse=True) for a in articles: a.pop('_score', None) card_by_pmid = {} for c in cards_in: if not isinstance(c, dict): continue pmid = str(c.get('pmid', '') or '').strip() if pmid and pmid not in card_by_pmid: card_by_pmid[pmid] = dict(c) evidence_cards = [] for a in articles: pmid = str(a.get('pmid', '') or '').strip() c = card_by_pmid.get(pmid, {}) if not c: c = { 'pmid': pmid, 'topic_bucket': a.get('topic_bucket', 'general'), 'inclusion_reason': 'Selected for clinical relevance and recency.', 'confidence': 'medium', 'title': a.get('title', ''), 'pubdate': a.get('pubdate', ''), 'source': a.get('source', ''), } evidence_cards.append(c) total_with_abstract = 0 lines = [] links_html_lines = [] for i, a in enumerate(articles): pmid = str(a.get('pmid', '') or '').strip() title = str(a.get('title', '') or '').strip() or '(untitled)' authors = str(a.get('authors', '') or '').strip() source = str(a.get('source', '') or '').strip() pubdate = str(a.get('pubdate', '') or '').strip() doi = str(a.get('doi', '') or '').strip() abstract = str(a.get('abstract', '') or '').strip() if abstract: total_with_abstract += 1 pubmed_url = str(a.get('pubmed_url', '') or '').strip() or (f'https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/{pmid}/' if pmid else '') doi_url = str(a.get('doi_url', '') or '').strip() or (f'https://doi.org/{doi}' if doi else '') line = '[' + str(i+1) + '] ' + title line += '\n PMID: ' + (pmid or 'n/a') if authors: line += '\n Authors: ' + authors if source or pubdate: line += '\n Journal: ' + source + (' (' + pubdate + ')' if pubdate else '') if doi: line += '\n DOI: ' + doi if abstract: line += '\n Abstract: ' + abstract[:3000] lines.append(line) link_parts = [] if pubmed_url: link_parts.append('PubMed') if doi_url: link_parts.append('DOI') links = ' | '.join(link_parts) if link_parts else 'No link available' links_html_lines.append('
  • ' + title + ' (PMID: ' + (pmid or 'n/a') + ') — ' + links + '
    • ') source_links_html = '
      ' + ''.join(links_html_lines) + '
    ' if links_html_lines else '

    No sources to display.

    ' return { 'query_text': query_text, 'query_variants': data.get('query_variants', []) if isinstance(data, dict) else [], 'fallback_used': fallback_used, 'total_found_estimate': total_found_estimate, 'total_requested': total_requested, 'total_analyzed': len(articles), 'total_with_abstract': total_with_abstract, 'article_count': len(articles), 'articles': articles, 'evidence_cards': evidence_cards, 'articles_text': '\n\n'.join(lines), 'source_links_html': source_links_html, }

flow_definitions.label: Evidence Quality Scoring
flow_definitions.description: LLM estimates reliability and evidence strength of the fetched PubMed set.
flow_definitions.prompt:
You are an evidence appraisal assistant.

Based ONLY on the evidence cards and metadata below, estimate credibility of the evidence base for clinical decision support.

Disease/topic: {{ context.pm-2.result.query_text }}
Articles retrieved: {{ context.pm-2.result.article_count }}
Browser fallback used: {{ context.pm-2.result.fallback_used }}

--- Evidence cards ---
{{ context.pm-2.result.evidence_cards }}

--- Articles ---
{{ context.pm-2.result.articles_text }}

Return structured assessment:
1. evidence_score (0-100)
2. evidence_level: high/moderate/low/very_low
3. confidence_index (0-100)
4. risk_of_bias
5. main_limitations
6. consistency_assessment
7. clinical_reliability_comment

Do not invent study details not present in the input.

flow_definitions.label: AI Literature Guideline
flow_definitions.description: LLM creates an actionable, evidence-based clinical guideline from PubMed findings.

flow_definitions.label: Consistency evaluation
flow_definitions.description: Structured second pass: flags inconsistencies between synthesis and retrieval-derived facts (does not rewrite HTML).
flow_definitions.prompt:
Issue codes (examples — add a clear code when none fit): INTERNAL_CONTRADICTION, CROSS_SECTION_NUMERIC_MISMATCH, PMID_OR_SOURCE_MISMATCH, NUMERIC_OR_COUNT_MISMATCH, SECTION_LEVEL_MISMATCH, IMPOSSIBLE_OR_FAKE_PMID, META_AGENT_TEXT_LEAK, UNSUPPORTED_SCREENING_OR_DOSE_CLAIM.

Emphasis:
- Compare the same drug, trial primary endpoint, dosing schedule, epidemiology figures, and radiation vs contraindication statements across every heading in SYNTHESIS; each material clash is at least one issue with both locations.
- Flag PMIDs with implausible digit counts vs realistic PubMed ranges, or citations labeled as PubMed that are clearly Bookshelf/reviews when the text claims a primary article.
- Flag any visible assistant planning/meta prose.
- suggested_fix must be one concrete harmonization per issue (single evidence-aligned reading from REFERENCE_FACTS, or explicit downgrade to conditional/unknown when refs are insufficient).

flow_definitions.label: Guideline consistency repair
flow_definitions.description: Applies evaluator feedback to the pm-4 draft; same structured schema as the guideline step.

flow_definitions.label: PubMed Author Fetch
flow_definitions.description: Search PubMed and fetch per-author affiliation XML.

flow_definitions.label: Affiliation Parser
flow_definitions.description: Parse raw affiliation strings to country/continent.

flow_definitions.label: Affiliation geo (Brave+LLM)
flow_definitions.description: Infer missing country from web search + structured LLM when PubMed affiliation has no ISO2.

flow_definitions.label: Author Aggregator
flow_definitions.description: Disambiguate and group authors across papers.

flow_definitions.label: Role Classifier
flow_definitions.description: Assign clinical roles and flags to aggregated authors.

flow_definitions.label: Specialty Enrich (NPPES)
flow_definitions.description: Attach canonical NUCC clinical specialty + practice address for US physicians via NPPES.

flow_definitions.label: AI Justification
flow_definitions.description: Generate LLM justifications for top-scored authors.
